iterate_latest.summary: SmartViewer in-app Markdown rich editor (TipTap) + first project-file write surface. New PUT /api/external/projects/:id/file (markdown-only allowlist, realPathGuard, 2 MiB byte-accurate cap, content-hash ETag/If-Match optimistic concurrency -> 409, atomic tmp+rename); GET /file gains the strong ETag. Client: lazy MarkdownEditorModal (loading/load-error/editing/diff/saving/conflict) + MarkdownDiffView (escaped) + markdownTiptap (StarterKit+tiptap-markdown, detectLossyConstructs) + markdownFileApi. server tsc + 1441/1441 vitest; client tsc + lint + 1456/1456 vitest; external plan-review (14 findings) + code-review (9 findings) integrated; F0.5 web E2E 2/2 (save+refresh + 409 conflict) against a live Vite stack.

surface_verification.note: Live Vite worktree stack (loopback :5199); /api file GET+PUT route-mocked in Playwright. Test 1: Edit -> rich editor -> type -> Review (diff) -> Save -> PUT fires -> modal closes -> preview re-fetches updated content. Test 2: PUT 409 -> conflict banner + reload action + edits preserved + modal stays open.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 Edit button shows for markdown only + gated on projectId/path/onSaved
AC2 StarterKit markdown round-trip stable via init AND the modal's setContent load path
AC3 detectLossyConstructs flags frontmatter/raw-HTML/footnotes/tables/task-lists + warn banner renders
behaviors.evidence: markdownTiptap.test.ts detect x6 + MarkdownEditorModal.test.tsx warn-banner PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC4 Review opens an escaped pre-save diff; Save reachable only from there
AC5 save writes atomically (server) + onSaved/close (client) + preview re-fetches (E2E)
behaviors.evidence: file-write-route.test.ts atomic-write + MarkdownEditorModal.test.tsx onSaved+close + E2E markdown-editor.spec.ts preview-refresh PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC6 stale If-Match -> 409, no write; modal keeps edits + offers reload
behaviors.evidence: file-write-route.test.ts 409 + markdownFileApi.test.ts MarkdownConflictError + MarkdownEditorModal.test.tsx conflict + E2E 409 path PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC7 PUT guards: 415 non-md / 400 traversal+missing-If-Match / 413 oversize byte-accurate / 404 missing / 400 not_a_file
GET /file emits a quoted sha256 ETag (the If-Match token)
behaviors.evidence: file-write-route.test.ts 'GET emits a quoted sha256 ETag' PASSED
